channel.title: Columbia City Farmers Market
channel.description: Upcoming events for Columbia City Farmers Market

item.title: Columbia City Farmers Market
item.description:
Wednesday, May 6, 2026 at 3 PM

Location: 37th Ave S & S Edmunds St, Seattle

Seasonal Wednesday evening farmers market in Columbia City, one block from the light rail station. Runs May through October.

Event details
